310.title: Paranormal Survivor
310.description: A woman's young nephew is attacked by something horrific; a man takes a job at a restaurant with a resident ghost; a woman is stalked by an obsessive spirit with a violent streak.

329.title: Paranormal Survivor
329.description: A woman shares her experience with evil spirits. A couple claims to have been attacked by a demon.

341.title: Paranormal Survivor
341.description: A woman shares her experience with evil spirits. A couple claims to have been attacked by a demon.

354.title: Paranormal Survivor
354.description: A family is terrorised by a supernatural beast that stalks around their trailer.

449.title: Paranormal Survivor
449.description: A woman claims to be tormented by apparitions. The story of a teen being attacked by a demonic beast. Rocky Primiani shares his story of encounters with the afterlife.

461.title: Paranormal Survivor
461.description: A woman claims to be tormented by apparitions. The story of a teen being attacked by a demonic beast. Rocky Primiani shares his story of encounters with the afterlife.

474.title: Paranormal Survivor
474.description: The ghosts of prisoners make jailhouse ghost tours too scary; a woman is attacked by a spirit lurking in her historic home; renovations unleash ghosts protecting a centuries-old secret.

493.title: Paranormal Survivor
493.description: Chris Houston is haunted by an evil ghost boy. A farmhouse is cursed by the presence of dark entities. Something dangerously demonic lurks in Bonnie Shukofksy's home.

505.title: Paranormal Survivor
505.description: Chris Houston is haunted by an evil ghost boy. A farmhouse is cursed by the presence of dark entities. Something dangerously demonic lurks in Bonnie Shukofksy's home.

518.title: Paranormal Survivor
518.description: A woman is horrified to discover restless souls buried in the cemetery next to her house; when a man digs up an old tombstone in his yard, he unwittingly unearths a violent entity.

536.title: Paranormal Survivor
536.description: The story of a woman who is followed by the evil spirit of a bootlegger. Felicia Sills finds a Civil War-era ring.

547.title: Paranormal Survivor
547.description: The story of a woman who is followed by the evil spirit of a bootlegger. Felicia Sills finds a Civil War-era ring.

559.title: Paranormal Survivor
559.description: Crystal Martin and her sister were terrorised for years by ghosts.

577.title: Paranormal Survivor
577.description: A man shares his story of a monster attack. The story of a couple who experienced violent paranormal activity. Holly shares her story of being haunted be her ex-husband's ghost.

588.title: Paranormal Survivor
588.description: A man shares his story of a monster attack. The story of a couple who experienced violent paranormal activity. Holly shares her story of being haunted be her ex-husband's ghost.

7092.title: Paranormal Survivor
7092.description: Ghosts, poltergeists, demons and their targets star in `Paranormal Survivor.' Hour-long episodes feature people reliving their harrowing encounters with the supernatural. Viewers hear from those who've faced the feared spirits, and dramatic re-creations lure victims back to the scenes of the confrontations.

7103.title: Paranormal Survivor
7103.description: Ghosts, poltergeists, demons and their targets star in `Paranormal Survivor.' Hour-long episodes feature people reliving their harrowing encounters with the supernatural. Viewers hear from those who've faced the feared spirits, and dramatic re-creations lure victims back to the scenes of the confrontations.

7115.title: Paranormal Survivor
7115.description: Teenagers Gaye and her sister summon the dead; Marina Duarte is plagued by paranormal activity after a spirit board session; Lisa discovers that not all the ghosts haunting her childhood home are evil.

7232.title: Paranormal Survivor
7232.description: Julie purchases a farmhouse and claims it's haunted by an evil slave runner. A couple shares their story of a ghost targeting their son; the story of a fixer-upper haunting.

7273.title: Paranormal Survivor
7273.description: Monica shares her experiences being stalked by the Grim Reaper; Brittany shares her experiences of torment. A mother and her two daughters share their experiences with an evil lizard-man.

7314.title: Paranormal Survivor
7314.description: A man explains how his home went from strange to scary. A man explains how he became a beacon for lost spirits. A woman claims to have been violently attacked by a shadowy monster.
